title: MegaLong™ Protocol for Isolation of >100kb Genomic DNA (Bacterial DNA)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5f6qd","text":"MegaLong™ isolates high molecular weight (\u003e100kb) genomic DNA from a variety of samples, including animal tissues, cultured cells, whole blood, bacterial and yeast.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"sffp","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bt6fv","text":"The protocol described here is for bacteral DNA samples. Please refer to the appropriate protocol, depending on your application.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":64,"length":33}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"DC9DBB33CC304BDBBC4B91B423BB0550","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/MegaLong-Protocols-Collection-for-Isolation-of-100-e7kbhkw"}}}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"csh50","text":"INTRODUCTION  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2d6l2","text":"MegaLong™ isolates high molecular weight (>100kb) genomic DNA from a variety of samples, including animal tissues, cultured cells, whole blood, bacterial and yeast.  MegaLong™ uses Genomic Tube-O-DIALYZER™, a unique micro dialysis device with a 0.45µm membrane, which minimizes sample manipulation, one of the main reasons for DNA breakage.  MegaLong™ isolates nuclei under mild extraction conditions and releases genomic DNA by digestion of nuclear proteins with a highly active LongLife™ Proteinase K. The digestion is performed in the Tube-O-DIALYZER™ and after digestion the Tube-ODIALYZER™ is inverted to dialyze away digested protein and other impurities leaving behind highly pure and fully hydrated genomic DNA.  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f3tnv","text":" The fragile, high molecular weight genomic DNA can be stored in the Tube-O-DIALYZER™ to further minimize mechanical manipulation of the DNA. The DNA is suitable for Southern blot analysis, recovery of Lambda shuttle vectors from transgenic animals, PCR, analysis by pulsed-field electrophoresis or any application where genomic DNA is required.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8ft4","text":" APPLICATIONS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":1,"length":12}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"17hgg","text":"MegaLong™ kit can be used for the isolation of genomic DNA from animal tissues, cultured cells, whole blood, bacterial and yeast.  For samples unsuitable for the isolation of high molecular weight DNA with MegaLong™, G-Biosciences recommends using the OmniPrep™ Genomic DNA isolation kit (Cat. # 786-136). ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7qcm0","text":" The kit is supplied as a Micro or Large packs to process either 25 or 50 1-25mg samples.   ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"eggpl","text":"  ITEM(S) SUPPLIED","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":1,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"16cr5","text":"  Description Cat. # 786-146 Cat. # 786-147 Nuclei Isolation Buffe 2 x 30ml 4 x 30ml Suspension Buffer 1 x 10ml 2 x 10ml Digestion Buffer 1 x 2ml 2 x 2ml LongLife™ Proteinase K [5mg/ml] 2 x 0.5ml 4 x 0.5ml Genomic Tube-O-Dialyzer™      25      50 Floats (Medi)        6    6 Caps (Medi)    25        50 Forceps    1    1 ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":3,"length":12},{"style":"bold","offset":16,"length":15},{"style":"bold","offset":32,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":342}],"data":[]},{"key":"1uq07","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4sqbo","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fftsu","text":" STORAGE CONDITION","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":4,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2mbss","text":"The kit is shipped at ambient temperature. Upon arrival, store LongLife™ Proteinase K at -20°C and remaining components at 4°C.  LongLife™ Proteinase K solution is stable for 1 year, if stored properly.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"14p7v","text":" ADDITIONAL MATERIALS REQUIRED ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":1,"length":29}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"92mgs","text":"• Microfuge tubes & pestles (Cat. # 786-138P) ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1rpng","text":"• TE buffer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f4s00","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dfb3h","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"tables","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"cellsMeta":{"0_0":"","0_1":"","0_2":"","1_0":"","1_1":"","1_2":"","2_0":"","2_1":"","2_2":"","3_0":"","3_1":"","3_2":"","4_0":"","4_1":"","4_2":"","5_0":"","5_1":"","5_2":"","6_0":"","6_1":"","6_2":"","7_0":"","7_1":"","7_2":"","8_0":"","8_1":"","8_2":""},"colWidths":[172,163,166],"data":[[" Description","Cat. # 786-146 ","Cat. # 786-147"],["Nuclei Isolation Buffe","2 x 30ml","4 x 30ml"],["Suspension Buffer","1 x 10ml","2 x 10ml"],["Digestion Buffer","1 x 2ml","2 x 2ml"],["LongLife™ Proteinase K [5mg/ml]","2 x 0.5ml","4 x 0.5ml"],["Genomic Tube-O-Dialyzer™  ","   25  ","   50"],["Floats (Medi)    ","   6","   6"],["Caps (Medi)","   25    ","   50"],["Forceps","   1","   1"]],"guid":"80FDADF0458011E9A24D69A8AA1320D3","legend":"","mergeCells":[],"rowHeights":[],"show_headers":true}}}}
steps: On ice, add 0.5ml bacteria culture to a Tube-O-DIALYZER™ and centrifuge at 5,000xg for 5 minutes to pellet cells. Discard the supernatant. 00:05:00
Add 50µl lysis solution containing 1% SDS, 0.1N NaOH and 10mM EDTA (not supplied), 25µl of Digestion Buffer and 10µl LongLife™ Proteinase K Solution.
Incubate at 55°C for 2-4 hours with periodic rocking. Do not vortex. 00:30:00 NOTE: For periodic rocking, gently invert the tube 2-3 times every 30 minutes.
After digestion is complete, centrifuge the tube for 20 seconds at 1,000g. 00:00:20
Replace the cap with the dialysis cap. Do not discard the storage cap as this will be required for storage of DNA.

Place the Tube-O-DIALYZER™ upside down in a 50ml centrifuge tube and centrifuge at 1000xg for 30 seconds to bring the sample onto the dialysis membrane. 00:00:30 NOTE: Do not centrifuge longer or faster than stated to prevent damage to membrane and sample loss.

Remove the Tube-O-DIALYZER™ from the 50ml tube with forceps and keeping it inverted slide into the provided float and dialyze in 500ml 1X TE buffer at room temperature for 18-24 hours with 2-3 buffer changes. Gently swirl tube to mix contents at each buffer change. 18:00:00 NOTE: Cloudy DNA is an indication of incomplete dialysis, therefore dialyze for an additional 24 hours. Change dialysis buffer and mix the content of the Tube-ODIALYZER™ by gently swirling every few hours.

Following dialysis the genomic DNA may be concentrated in the Tube-O-DIALYZER™ using either Tube-O-DIALYZER™ Concentrator (Cat. # 786-144) or Concentrator Solution (Cat. # 786-143). Simply prepare the Concentrator as per the instructions and invert the Tube-O-DIALYZER™ containing your DNA in the solution.
If concentration is not required or following concentration, centrifuge the tube at 1000xg for 1 minute. Replace the dialysis cap with the normal cap. The genomic DNA is now ready for use. 00:01:00
creator: Colin Heath
